label: Battery visibility fix
items: Refresh button now refreshes everything. Previously it only polled Ecowitt — eWeLink valves never updated unless you opened each one individually. Now one tap asks every Ecowitt sensor AND every eWeLink valve for fresh state in parallel, including battery.

Battery is now always shown on device cards. When known, the colour-graded pip shows the actual percentage. When the device hasn't reported one yet, a muted 'Battery —' placeholder appears with a tooltip explaining why — so you can tell wired-but-waiting from never-wired at a glance.
Loosened the Ecowitt voltage range from 0.8–2.0V to 0.5–3.5V (and 500–3500 mV) — covers AAA, alkaline, and gateway-firmware edge cases that were previously rejected as out-of-range.

Server-side: insertReading now logs any failure to update the devices.battery_* columns instead of swallowing it, and every Ecowitt poll cycle emits a battery_diagnostic log line showing the raw soilbattN value. If battery still doesn't show after this release, the log stream tells us why.
New schema-missing banner on the Integrations page — if the battery columns somehow aren't on this Supabase project, you'll see a clear warning rather than guessing why the pip is dark.
